content_body: My husband and I had a great time in Blue Ridge and at Arcadia cabin. The cabin is amazing—beautifully decorated and immaculately clean. And the view is incredible!!! Special thanks to Gary for assisting us with booking Arcadia when our first choice was unavailable. It was a blessing!!! Cabin Rentals of Georgia was a pleasure to deal with. Looking forward to a return visit in the near future!
title: Beautifully Decorated and Immaculately Clean
